_meta.description: Diablo II monster family traits, abilities, and behaviors for Rouge card game adaptation

d2Traits.flee_on_ally_death: All nearby Fallen flee when any kill happens near them. They scatter briefly then return to fight.
d2Traits.resurrection_by_shaman: Dead Fallen can be resurrected by their Shaman counterparts. Resurrected Fallen give no XP/loot.
d2Traits.pack_behavior: Always appear in groups of 3-6. Individually weak but dangerous in numbers.
d2Traits.elemental_attacks: Higher variants add fire, cold, lightning, or poison to their melee attacks.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: When a Fallen ally dies, remaining Fallen skip their next attack (flee). Low stats but appear in larger groups.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: On ally death: Fallen enemies lose their next turn (flee). Compensate with larger pack sizes (4-5 instead of 3).

d2Traits.resurrect_fallen: Can resurrect dead Fallen-type monsters. This is their primary ability and they will prioritize it over attacking.
d2Traits.fireball: Ranged fire attack dealing moderate damage.
d2Traits.no_flee: Unlike their Fallen minions, Shamans do NOT flee when allies die.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Priority: resurrect dead Fallen allies. Secondary: ranged fire attack. Kill the Shaman first or Fallen keep coming back.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: New intent kind 'resurrect_ally': revive one dead non-shaman ally at 50% HP. Must be killed first to stop the cycle.

d2Traits.slow_movement: Extremely slow movement speed, among the slowest monsters in the game.
d2Traits.poison_on_death: Some variants (Dried Corpse, Plague Bearer) release poison cloud on death.
d2Traits.high_hp: Higher HP than most monsters at their level to compensate for low speed.
d2Traits.disease: Higher variants can inflict poison damage on hit.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Slow but tanky. Some variants deal poison damage to the player when they die.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: New trait 'death_burst_poison': On death, apply 2 poison to hero. Higher act variants apply more. Acts as a punishment for killing them.

d2Traits.fragile: Lower HP than most monsters but decent damage.
d2Traits.shield_block: Some variants carry shields and can block attacks.
d2Traits.weapon_variety: Different variants use different weapons affecting damage type and speed.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Glass cannon raider. Low HP but solid attack. Shield variants get starting guard.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Some skeleton variants start combat with 2-3 guard (shield block). Lower life, higher attack than standard raiders.

d2Traits.ranged_physical: Fire arrows at range dealing physical damage.
d2Traits.fire_arrows: Burning Dead Archer variants fire flaming arrows dealing fire+physical damage.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Standard ranged attacker. Fire variants apply burn on attack.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Burning Dead Archer intent includes apply_burn effect: 'attack' + 'apply 1 burn to target'.

d2Traits.elemental_bolts: Fire bolts of random element: fire, cold, lightning, or poison.
d2Traits.cold_slow: Cold bolt variant slows player movement and attack speed.
d2Traits.poison_dot: Poison bolt variant applies damage over time.
d2Traits.fire_burst: Fire bolt variant deals burst fire damage.
d2Traits.lightning_spike: Lightning bolt variant deals high but variable damage.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Elemental ranged attacker. Each mage specializes in one element, applying its status effect.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Intent rotation includes status effect application: fire mage applies burn, cold mage applies slow, poison mage applies poison to hero. New mechanic: enemies can apply status effects TO the player.

d2Traits.resurrect_undead: Can resurrect any dead undead monster in range (except other Greater Mummies).
d2Traits.poison_breath: Ranged poison cloud attack dealing damage over time (7-138 dmg over 4-16 seconds).
d2Traits.unholy_bolts: Fire magic damage projectiles that bypass most resistances.
d2Traits.fast_regen: Regenerate HP 50% faster than normal monsters.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: The undead version of Fallen Shaman but MORE dangerous. Resurrects ANY undead ally. Applies poison. High priority kill target.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Intent: 1) resurrect_ally (revive dead undead at 50% HP), 2) poison_breath (apply 3 poison to hero), 3) unholy_bolt (magic damage ignoring guard). Passive: regenerate 1 HP per turn.

d2Traits.defensive_curl: Curl into a ball when dying, becoming briefly harder to hit.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Basic ranged attacker. Fires quill volleys.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Standard ranged with attack_all (quill spray) as primary intent.

d2Traits.heavy_melee: Strong melee attackers with high damage.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Durable melee fighters. High damage, high HP. The baseline brute enemy.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Standard brute with guard + heavy attack rotation.

d2Traits.fast_attack: Quick attack speed, especially with dual-wielding variants.
d2Traits.bow_variants: Some variants (Dark Archer, Vile Archer, Black Archer) use ranged attacks.
d2Traits.dodge: Some variants can dodge incoming attacks.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Fast attackers that can hit twice. Bow variants serve as ranged.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Intent with two attacks in one turn at reduced damage (e.g., 'Dual Strike': two hits of attack/2 each).

d2Traits.leap_attack: Jump onto targets from distance, closing gaps quickly.
d2Traits.evasive: Leap away from danger, hard to pin down.
d2Traits.ambush: Emerge from underground/hiding for surprise attacks.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Leaps past guard. First attack each combat ignores guard (ambush from underground).
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: First intent is always sunder_attack (leap bypasses guard). Then alternates normal attacks.

d2Traits.lightning_charge: Charged bolt attack on hit that deals lightning damage.
d2Traits.armored: High defense, resistant to physical damage.
d2Traits.lightning_aura: Some variants deal lightning damage to melee attackers (thorns-like effect).

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Armored beetles that shock attackers. Taking damage from them applies burn (re-flavored as lightning).
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Passive trait 'thorns': when hit by melee/card damage, deal 1-2 damage back to hero. Guard + attack rotation with high guard values.

d2Traits.lay_eggs: Lay Sand Maggot Eggs that hatch into Sand Maggot Young.
d2Traits.burrow: Emerge from underground, briefly invulnerable during emergence.
d2Traits.young_swarm: Young maggots are weak but numerous, swarming the player.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Lays eggs that hatch into weak raiders. Must kill the Maggot to stop the flood of minions.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: New intent kind 'summon_minion': add a weak raider enemy (Sand Maggot Young) to the encounter. Young have ~40% HP of a normal raider. Maggot alternates between summoning and poison spit.

d2Traits.charge_attack: Charge attack that deals heavy damage and knockback.
d2Traits.poison_melee: Melee attacks deal poison damage (Pit Viper, Tomb Viper).

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Charge attack that sunders guard. Poison variants apply poison on hit.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Intent rotation: 1) sunder_attack (charge), 2) attack + apply_poison. Higher variants get both poison and sunder in rotation.

d2Traits.fireball: Cast Fireball for ranged fire damage.
d2Traits.fire_wall: Cast Fire Wall creating a persistent fire zone.
d2Traits.meteor: Dark Lord and Blood Lord cast Meteor for massive fire burst.
d2Traits.life_drain: Melee attacks drain life from the player.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Ranged fire casters that also drain life on melee. Extremely dangerous in later acts with Meteor.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Intent rotation: 1) drain_attack (life steal melee), 2) attack_all (fireball AoE), 3) apply_burn_all (fire wall). Blood Lord gets a 4th: massive single-target fire hit (Meteor).

d2Traits.mana_drain: Attacks drain player's mana instead of (or in addition to) HP.
d2Traits.pass_through_walls: Can move through obstacles and walls.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Drains player energy instead of dealing damage. Forces suboptimal card plays.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: New intent kind 'drain_energy': reduce hero energy by 1 next turn (hero draws one fewer card or starts with less energy). Also deals minor damage.

d2Traits.lightning_speed: Extremely fast movement and attack speed. Swarm furiously.
d2Traits.double_attack: Attack speed so fast they effectively hit twice in the time other monsters hit once.
d2Traits.stab_and_run: Rush in, attack, retreat. Hard to pin down.
d2Traits.pack_swarm: Always appear in large groups, overwhelming through numbers.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Super fast — attacks TWICE per enemy turn. Low HP and damage per hit but the double strike makes them lethal in groups.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: New trait 'swift': this enemy executes its attack intent TWICE per turn. Low individual damage (60% of normal raider) but double hits. Appear in packs of 4-5.

d2Traits.inferno: Breathe fire (Inferno skill) dealing continuous fire damage.
d2Traits.carried_by_fetish: Lore: carried on shoulders of lesser Fetish for height advantage.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Resurrects dead Fetish allies AND breathes fire for AoE burn damage.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Intent rotation: 1) resurrect_ally (revive dead Fetish at 50% HP), 2) apply_burn_all (inferno breath, apply 2 burn to all party). Priority target — kill before Fetish to prevent endless resurrection.

d2Traits.death_explosion: Explode on death dealing massive physical damage (10% of their max HP). Stygian Dolls are among the most dangerous non-boss monsters in the game.
d2Traits.fast_movement: Nearly as fast as living Fetish variants.
d2Traits.suicidal_rush: Tend to charge directly at the player.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: EXPLODES on death dealing massive damage to the hero. The most dangerous trash mob in D2.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: New trait 'death_explosion': on death, deal damage equal to 30-50% of their max HP to the hero (bypasses guard). Player must strategize: use ranged damage, or accept the burst. Killing with poison avoids explosion (already dead when poison ticks).

d2Traits.knockback: Powerful melee attacks that knock back the player.
d2Traits.frenzy: Attack speed increases as HP drops (some variants).
d2Traits.thorns_aura: Reflect a portion of melee damage back at attacker.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Gets more dangerous as HP drops. Below 50% HP, attack damage increases by 50%.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: New trait 'frenzy': when below 50% max HP, all attack intent values increase by 50% (floored). High HP brute that becomes a ticking time bomb.

d2Traits.lightning_bolt: Fire high-damage lightning bolts at extreme range. Known as the most dangerous regular monster in the game.
d2Traits.invisible_approach: Hard to see, nearly invisible at distance.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Fires devastating lightning bolts. Very high damage ranged attack but fragile. The glass cannon of D2.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Extremely high attack for ranged role (+50% above normal ranged), very low HP (-30%). Intent: 1) lightning bolt (high single-target damage + drain 1 energy), 2) teleport (gain guard from repositioning).

d2Traits.blood_star: Fire Blood Star projectiles that always hit (physical damage).
d2Traits.curse_defense: Cast curse that lowers player defense.
d2Traits.blood_mana_curse: Cast Blood Mana curse — spells cost HP as well as mana. Extremely dangerous for casters.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Curses the player so card plays cost HP in addition to energy. Forces difficult resource decisions.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: New intent kind 'curse_blood_mana': for 2 turns, each card the hero plays also costs 1 HP per energy cost. Alternates with blood_star (guaranteed hit ranged attack).

d2Traits.curses: Cast Decrepify, Lower Resist, Weaken, Life Tap, Amplify Damage on the player.
d2Traits.bone_spirit: Fire homing Bone Spirit projectiles dealing magic damage (82-87 in Hell).
d2Traits.no_melee: Pure spellcaster — no melee attack at all.
d2Traits.high_resistances: 60% fire/lightning resistance, up to 180% cold resistance.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: The most dangerous support enemy. Curses that weaken the player AND fires bone spirits. No melee, pure caster.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Intent rotation: 1) 'curse_amplify_damage' — hero takes 50% more damage for 2 turns, 2) bone_spirit (high magic damage that ignores guard), 3) 'curse_decrepify' — hero deals 30% less damage for 2 turns. Three-phase rotation makes them extremely threatening.

d2Traits.inferno_breath: Breathe fire (Inferno) dealing continuous fire damage.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: The ultimate brute. Massive HP, massive damage, AND fire breath that burns the whole party.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Intent rotation: 1) guard + inferno (gain guard AND apply 2 burn to all party), 2) heavy attack (highest single-target damage of any non-boss). Stats: 130% of normal brute HP, 120% attack.

d2Traits.smite: Powerful melee attack with stun/knockback effect.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Slow but devastating. Attacks stun the target.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Intent includes stun effect: attack that also applies 1 stun to the hero (hero loses 1 energy or skips a card draw next turn).

d2Traits.stun_attack: Heavy melee attack that stuns the player.
d2Traits.grab: Can grab and squeeze the player for sustained damage.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Grabs the hero — deals damage over 2 turns while reducing hero actions.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Intent: 1) grab (deal moderate damage + apply 1 paralyze to hero), 2) squeeze (deal heavy damage to paralyzed target).

d2Traits.whip_attack: Use whip weapons for moderate range.
d2Traits.pack_hunting: Appear in small groups, coordinate attacks.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Fast attackers. First attack is a pounce that deals bonus damage.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: First intent in rotation does +2 bonus damage (pounce). Then standard attacks.

d2Traits.whip_minions: Whip nearby Minion-type monsters to make them go into Frenzy mode (faster, stronger).
d2Traits.buff_allies: Primary role is buffing nearby allies' attack speed and damage.
d2Traits.melee_whip: Also attacks players with whip for moderate damage.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Whips allies into frenzy — buffs all allies' next attack damage. Kill the Overseer to stop the damage amplification.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: New intent kind 'buff_allies_attack': all living allies deal +2 damage on their next attack. Alternates with moderate melee attack.

d2Traits.hydra: Summon Hydra turrets that fire fireballs.
d2Traits.blizzard: Cast Blizzard for area cold damage.
d2Traits.glacial_spike: Cast Glacial Spike for cold damage + freeze.
d2Traits.high_hp: Very high HP for a non-boss monster.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Mini-boss tier monster. Summons fire hydra (persistent burn), casts blizzard (AoE + freeze), and heals allies.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Intent rotation: 1) attack_all + apply_burn_all (hydra/blizzard), 2) heal_allies, 3) sunder_attack (glacial spike). Treat as mini-boss with elevated stats.

d2Traits.melee_zealots: Zealots use fast melee attacks (Zeal-like multi-hit).
d2Traits.healing_priests: Priests (Cantor, Heirophant, Sexton) heal and buff allies.
d2Traits.conviction_aura: Some variants have Conviction aura lowering player resistances.
d2Traits.fanaticism_aura: Some variants have Fanaticism aura boosting ally damage and speed.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Zealots multi-hit, Priests heal and provide aura buffs to all allies.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Heirophant/Cantor get new intent 'aura_fanaticism': all allies deal +2 damage this turn (persistent while alive). Zealots get multi-hit intent similar to Fetish double strike.

d2Traits.emerge_attack: Emerge from water/swamp for surprise attack.
d2Traits.pull_in: Grab and pull player toward them.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Emerges for a surprise first attack, then grabs and poisons.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: First intent is sunder_attack (emerge). Second intent: attack + apply_poison.

d2Traits.web_slow: Spray web that slows player movement and attack speed.
d2Traits.fire_spider: Flame Spider variants deal fire damage.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Slows the player with webs and poisons from range.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Intent rotation: 1) apply_slow to hero (web), 2) attack + apply_poison (venom spit). Forces player to deal with movement debuffs.

d2Traits.drain_life: Constantly drain player HP while engaged.
d2Traits.small_target: Very hard to hit due to small size.
d2Traits.persistent_damage: Deal continuous low damage that adds up.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Tiny persistent damage. Low HP but drains life every turn.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Passive: deals 1 damage to hero at start of each player turn (unavoidable chip damage). Regular intent is also drain_attack.

d2Traits.erratic_movement: Unpredictable flight patterns make targeting difficult.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Flying drain attacker. Hard to target, drains life.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Standard ranged role but uses drain_attack instead of normal attack.

d2Traits.spawn_young: Periodically spawn Vile Child monsters from their body.
d2Traits.death_spawn: On death, release a burst of Vile Children.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Spawns weak Vile Child enemies AND spawns more on death. Flood the encounter with bodies.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Intent: 1) summon_minion (add Vile Child raider to encounter), 2) attack. On death: summon 2 Vile Children. Similar to Sand Maggot but with death burst spawning.

d2Traits.mana_drain: Ranged attack that drains player mana rapidly.
d2Traits.curse: Can cast curses on the player.
d2Traits.undead_magic: Deal magic damage with ranged attacks.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Drains player energy from range. Forces resource scarcity.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Intent: drain_energy (reduce hero max energy by 1 for next turn) + moderate magic damage.

d2Traits.undead_barbarian: Fallen barbarian warriors reanimated as undead.
d2Traits.double_swing: Use two-handed weapons for powerful double swing attacks.
d2Traits.durable: High HP undead with good damage.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Undead barbarians with two-hit melee attacks.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Intent rotation includes attack_all (double swing cleave) as primary, single-target heavy hit as secondary.

d2Traits.cold_attack: All attacks deal cold damage and can freeze the player.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Cold attackers that freeze/slow the player. Apply slow or freeze effects on hit.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Intent: attack + apply_slow to hero. Frenzied variant: attack + apply_freeze to hero (skips hero's next card draw or reduces hand size by 1).

d2Traits.burrow: Burrow underground and emerge at target's location.
d2Traits.corpse_explosion: Use Corpse Explosion on nearby dead monsters.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Burrows to bypass guard and explodes corpses for AoE damage based on dead enemies.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: New intent 'corpse_explosion': deal damage equal to 2 x number of dead enemies in encounter to all party. Burrow first attack is sunder_attack.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Fast fire-breathing imps that teleport and burn.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Intent: attack + apply_burn. Fragile ranged with burn application.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Another summoner type. Spawns Pain Worm minions and poisons.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Similar to Sand Maggot/Flesh Spawner: summon_minion + poison attack rotation.

d2Traits.slow_between: Slow movement but fast when attacking.
d2Traits.elemental_melee: Some variants add elemental damage to melee.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Multi-hit melee attackers. Slow approach but fast burst.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: Intent: attack intent with higher-than-normal value representing multiple fast hits.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Flying attacker with dive bomb (sunder attack) then ranged peck.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: First intent: sunder_attack (divebomb bypasses guard). Then ranged attack.

d2Traits.corpse_spit: Eat and regurgitate corpses as ranged attack.
d2Traits.deny_corpses: Consuming corpses denies them to the Necromancer for summoning.

gameAdaptation.traitDescription: Eats dead allies to heal and spit their remains at the player.
gameAdaptation.suggestedMechanic: New intent 'consume_corpse': remove one dead ally from the encounter (prevents resurrection by shamans) and heal self + deal ranged damage to hero. Counters resurrection mechanics.

statusEffectsOnPlayer._note: New status effects that monsters should be able to apply TO the player

slow.name: Chill / Slow
slow.effect: Reduces hero hand size by 1 for the duration. Draw fewer cards.

amplify_damage.name: Amplify Damage
amplify_damage.d2Source: Oblivion Knight curse, Cursed monster modifier
amplify_damage.effect: Hero takes 50% more damage from all sources for 2 turns.

weaken.name: Weaken / Decrepify
weaken.effect: Hero deals 30% less damage for 2 turns.

energy_drain.name: Mana Burn
energy_drain.d2Source: Wraith attacks, Mana Burn modifier, Finger Mage
energy_drain.effect: Hero starts next turn with 1 less energy.

blood_mana.name: Blood Mana
blood_mana.effect: Each card played costs 1 HP per energy cost for 2 turns.

burn.name: Fire Damage
burn.effect: Take burn damage each turn, decrement by 1.

poison.name: Poison
poison.effect: Take poison damage each turn (bypasses guard), decrement by 1.

monsterTraits._note: New passive traits that can be assigned to enemy templates

resurrect_ally.name: Resurrect Ally
resurrect_ally.description: Can revive one dead ally at 50% HP instead of attacking.
resurrect_ally.priority: Always attempts resurrection before other intents if a dead ally exists.

swift.name: Swift / Double Strike
swift.description: Executes attack intent twice per enemy turn.
swift.balance: Reduce individual hit damage by ~40% to compensate for double hit.

flee_on_ally_death.name: Cowardice
flee_on_ally_death.description: When an ally dies, this enemy skips its next action.

death_explosion.name: Death Explosion
death_explosion.description: On death, deal damage to the hero equal to a percentage of max HP.
death_explosion.balance: 30-50% of max HP as damage. Bypasses guard. Poison kill avoids it.

death_poison.name: Poison Corpse
death_poison.description: On death, apply poison to the hero.

death_spawn.name: Death Spawn
death_spawn.description: On death, add 1-2 weak minion enemies to the encounter.

summon_minion.name: Summon Minion
summon_minion.description: Can add a weak raider enemy to the encounter instead of attacking.
summon_minion.balance: Cap at 5 enemies max in encounter. Summoned minions are weak.

frenzy.name: Frenzy
frenzy.description: Attack damage increases by 50% when below 50% HP.
frenzy.balance: Standard HP. The frenzy makes them dangerous to leave wounded.

thorns.name: Thorns / Lightning Aura
thorns.description: When damaged, deal 1-2 damage back to the attacker.
thorns.balance: Only triggers on direct damage cards, not DOT.

regeneration.name: Regeneration
regeneration.balance: Regenerate 1-2 HP per turn. Use poison to counteract.

consume_corpse.name: Consume Corpse
consume_corpse.description: Remove a dead enemy from the encounter and heal self.
consume_corpse.balance: Counters resurrection strategies. Heals for ~25% max HP.

monsterModifiers._note: D2-style random modifiers that can be applied to elite/unique enemies

extra_fast.name: Extra Fast
extra_fast.effect: Acts twice per turn (like Swift trait).

cursed.name: Cursed
cursed.effect: On hit, 50% chance to apply amplify_damage to hero for 2 turns.

cold_enchanted.name: Cold Enchanted
cold_enchanted.effect: Attacks apply 1 slow to hero. On death, apply 2 freeze to hero (Frost Nova).

fire_enchanted.name: Fire Enchanted
fire_enchanted.effect: Attacks apply 1 burn to hero. On death, deal 25% max HP as fire damage to hero.

lightning_enchanted.name: Lightning Enchanted
lightning_enchanted.effect: When hit by player, release charged bolts dealing 2 damage to hero.

stone_skin.name: Stone Skin
stone_skin.effect: +50% max HP. Start with guard equal to 30% max HP.

mana_burn.name: Mana Burn
mana_burn.effect: On hit, drain 1 energy from hero.

teleportation.name: Teleportation
teleportation.effect: When below 33% HP, gain 5 guard (teleport escape).

spectral_hit.name: Spectral Hit
spectral_hit.effect: Attacks deal random elemental effect: burn, poison, slow, or paralyze (1 stack).

aura_enchanted.name: Aura Enchanted
aura_enchanted.effect: Provides a passive aura: might (+2 ally damage), fanaticism (+3 ally damage), or conviction (hero takes +2 damage).
